Episodes.Title: How Long Is Forever?
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Starfire is accidentally sucked into a wormhole that sends her 20 years into the future.

Episodes.Title: Every Dog Has His Day
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: While taking the form of a dog, Beast Boy is mistaken for the lost dog of a lone alien.

Episodes.Title: Terra
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans meet and befriend an insecure girl named Terra who has tremendous power.

Episodes.Title: Only Human
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Cyborg believes that his robotic limbs have their limit in strength. He gets a chance to prove it when it falls to him to rescue the rest of the titans from an enemy robot.

Episodes.Title: Fear Itself
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: After the titans watch a horror movie, Raven refuses to admit that she's scared. Suddenly, weird things start happening in Titan's Tower.

Episodes.Title: Date with Destiny
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Killer Moth has amassed a large force of insects. He'll destroy the city with them unless Robin takes his daughter to her dance.

Episodes.Title: Transformation
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Starfire's growing up and going through changes. She tries to disguise her appearance fearing her friends won't approve of her; when that fails, she tries to run away, but the Titans come after their friend.

Episodes.Title: Titan Rising
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Terra returns claiming to have more control over her powers. Slade unleashes giant drill worms to sink the Titan's Tower.

Episodes.Title: Winner Take All
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Robin, Beast Boy, and Cyborg compete in a "Contest of Champions" against other super powered males. The Grand Master promises the winner will receive a prize.

Episodes.Title: Betrayal
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Terra takes Beast Boy on a date just as Slade launches an attack on the Titans. Terra's loyalties are revealed.

Episodes.Title: Fractured
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Larry, Robin's double, from a different dimension arrives and causes havoc.

Episodes.Title: Aftershock: Part 1
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Slade and Terra attack the city. The Titans try to stop them, but Terra knows their strengths and weaknesses.

Episodes.Title: Aftershock: Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: While Terra begins to subconsciously reconsider her betrayal of the Titans and her alliance with Slade, the disillusioned team regroups to counter attack.
